                    
DECLARE dMonth DATE ;
DECLARE nMonth SHORT;
DECLARE nCurrMonth SHORT;
DECLARE nYear INTEGER;
                    
DECLARE cTbl CURSOR AS 
                    
//find if late fee has not been applied and there is a balance
  SELECT * FROM (   
                 SELECT l.LeaseID, l.PropertyID, l.GraceDays, l.LateFee, 
                       ( SELECT TOP 1 t.amount          
                           FROM propertytransactions t  
                          WHERE t.LeaseID = l.LeaseID   
                            AND t.CatCode = '21-LateFees'
                            AND t.amount > 0.00         
                            AND Month( t.[date] ) = nMonth 
                            AND Year( t.[date] ) = nYear ) AS AmountPosted, 
                       ( SELECT SUM( IIF( c.Category = 0, t.Amount, 0.00 ) ) -  //charges - payments 
                                SUM( IIF( c.Category = 1, t.Amount, 0.00 ) ) AS CurBal 
                           FROM propertytransactions t                             
                           JOIN CatCodes c ON c.CatCode = t.CatCode                
                          WHERE t.LeaseID = l.leaseID                              
                            AND c.Category > -1   //leave out expenses makeing script quicker 
                                //leaveout any prior late fees balance             
                            //AND t.CatCode NOT IN ( '01-LateFees', '21-LateFees' )  
                                  //in case routine is ran later during the month  
                                  //make sure transactions posted past grace days  
                                  //are not considered.  If late charges had already 
                                  //been posted, they will be replaced with this late charge posting.
                             AND t.Date < Cast( CreateTimeStamp( nYear, nMonth, l.GraceDays+1, 0, 0, 0, 0 ) AS SQL_DATE ) 
                        GROUP BY t.LeaseID  
                        ) AS Bal            
                   FROM leases l            
                  WHERE l.StartDate < CurDate() 
                    AND l.LateFee > 0.00    
                    AND ( l.EndDate > CurDate() OR l.isMtoM ) 
                    AND DayOfMonth( CurDate() ) > l.GraceDays 
                ) a    
   WHERE a.Bal > 0.00 
     AND a.AmountPosted IS NULL ; 
                    
                    
  nMonth = ( SELECT Month FROM __input  );
  nYear =  ( SELECT Year FROM __input   );
                    
  OPEN cTbl ;
                    
  WHILE FETCH cTbl DO 
                    
     dMonth = Cast( CreateTimeStamp( nYear, nMonth, cTbl.GraceDays + 1, 0, 0, 0, 0 ) AS SQL_DATE ) ;
                    
     MERGE INTO propertytransactions ON propertyID = cTbl.PropertyID 
                                    AND CatCode = '21-LateFees' 
                                    AND Month( [date] ) = nMonth  
                                    AND Year( [date] ) = nYear    
     WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET Amount = cTbl.LateFee, leaseID = cTbl.LeaseID 
     WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( PtKey, CatCode, PropertyID, LeaseID, [Date], Amount, Notes )
                           VALUES ( NewSeqKey( 'PtKey' ),  
                                   '21-LateFees',          
                                   cTbl.PropertyID,        
                                   cTbl.LeaseID,           
                                   dMonth,                 
                                   cTbl.LateFee,           
                                   'AutoCharged by PmSys' ) ;  
  END ;       
CLOSE cTbl ;
